260.reason: [This move() is called before checking whether the current character is one of '!', '&', '|', '<', '>', or '=', causing the lexer to skip the next character prematurely for all these cases. For example, when c is '&', we immediately move() before verifying if it's part of "&&", which leads to incorrect lookahead and potential misalignment.]
